roles.name: Court Mage
roles.description: Keeper of arcane lore — designs the realm's solution and weaves enchantments into the architecture.

roles.name: Marshal of the Realm
roles.description: Marshals knights of delivery, holds the campaign timeline, and answers to the King.

roles.name: Steward of the Keep
roles.description: Steward of the castle records — layouts, fields, permission sets, and the keys to every chamber.

roles.name: Castle Smith
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features in the heat of the keep's smithy.

roles.name: Knight-Captain of the Round Table
roles.description: First among the knights of Salesforce craft — sets the chivalric code and guides the senior knights.

roles.name: Errant Knight of Logres
roles.description: Rides the borders of customer requirements with practiced sword and counsel.

roles.name: Squire of the Realm
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration into the field under the Errant Knight's eye.

roles.name: Bridgekeeper of Avalon
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond the mists.

roles.name: Drawbridge Engineer
roles.description: Lays the chains and timbers of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridgekeeper's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice of the Drawbridge
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the mason's patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Tournament Adjudicator
roles.description: Judge of the lists — finds flaws in armor and code before they meet the field of battle.

roles.name: Herald of Camelot
roles.description: Lifts the banner and the trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft of the court.

roles.name: Court Bard
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sings the deeds and conversions to the gathered hall.

roles.name: Banner-Bearer of the King
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily ride.

roles.name: Scribe of the Round Table
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is sworn — translates between mortal Customer and the wizard's craft of design.

roles.name: Master Smith of Excalibur
roles.description: Master of the Avalonian forge — crafts the keenest Apex and LWC features, mentor to the castle smiths.

roles.name: Page of the Court
roles.description: Newest to the keep — learns the crafts of admin and config under the Squire's tutelage.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Round Table Knights — Chivalric Order CRM
Enemies of Camelot — Threat Surveillance Build

round-table-knights.name: The Sword in the Stone
round-table-knights.description: Discovery sign-off — the rightful king proven and the project chartered.

round-table-knights.name: Forging of Excalibur
round-table-knights.description: Build kickoff: the king's blade reforged at Avalon.

round-table-knights.name: Audience at Camelot
round-table-knights.description: Mid-project gate: the Round Table reviews progress in council.

round-table-knights.name: Joust at Pentecost
round-table-knights.description: Phase invoice trigger: the great tournament marks the milestone payment.

round-table-knights.name: Knighting Ceremony
round-table-knights.description: Go-Live: new knights sworn to the order.

round-table-knights.name: Captain's Hand-off
round-table-knights.description: Hyper-care close: the order entrusted to Sir Lancelot.

pendragon-court.name: Royal Audience at Camelot
pendragon-court.description: Project kickoff: the court convened in the throne room.

pendragon-court.name: Crowning of the King
pendragon-court.description: Build phase: the crown placed upon Arthur's brow.

pendragon-court.name: Wedding at Camelot
pendragon-court.description: UAT gate: the realm united under the royal marriage.

pendragon-court.name: Pentecost Feast
pendragon-court.description: Go-Live: the great feast marks the platform live.

pendragon-court.name: Court Recess
pendragon-court.description: Hyper-care close: the court adjourns to the summer keep.

pendragon-court.name: Treasury Reckoning
pendragon-court.description: Final invoice: the Chamberlain settles the books.

grail-quest.name: Vision in the Hall
grail-quest.description: Discovery: the Grail appears in vision — the quest is set.

grail-quest.name: Departure from Camelot
grail-quest.description: Build: the chosen knights ride forth on pilgrimage.

grail-quest.name: Trial at Corbenic
grail-quest.description: Solution review at the Fisher King's castle.

grail-quest.name: Beholding of the Grail
grail-quest.description: Go-Live: the Holy Grail revealed to the worthy.

grail-quest.name: Ascension of Galahad
grail-quest.description: Project close: the purest knight is taken into glory.

grail-quest.name: Final Tithe
grail-quest.description: Final invoice from the abbey treasury.

enemies-of-camelot.name: The Shadow Stirs
enemies-of-camelot.description: Discovery: threat plane online — Morgan's plotting begins.

enemies-of-camelot.name: Morgan's Audit
enemies-of-camelot.description: Solution review with the enchantress herself.

enemies-of-camelot.name: Battle of Camlann
enemies-of-camelot.description: Go-Live: the great battle joined on the western field.

enemies-of-camelot.name: Mists of Avalon
enemies-of-camelot.description: Project close: the field falls silent, the mists roll in.

enemies-of-camelot.name: Spoils Reckoned
enemies-of-camelot.description: Final invoice tallied from the field.

King Arthur.notes: Hunt in the Forest Sauvage — pre-arranged royal leave.

Sir Lancelot.notes: Errand to Joyous Gard — personal business.

Sir Gawain.notes: Pilgrimage to the Green Chapel — annual obligation.

Sir Percival.notes: Visit to mother in the Welsh wilderness.

Sir Galahad.notes: Vigil and fast at the Abbey of the White Friars.

Sir Bedivere.notes: Lakeside watch — quarterly vigil at the Lady's mere.

Queen Guinevere.notes: Maying festival in the meadows of Carlisle.

Merlin.notes: Retreat to the crystal cave — prophetic meditation.

Morgan le Fay.notes: Sabbatical at the Castle of Maidens — sorcery refresher.

Mordred.notes: Plotting weekend at Orkney — strictly personal.

Nimue.notes: Lake of Avalon — quarterly water rites.

Joseph of Arimathea.notes: Pilgrimage to Glastonbury Tor — founding rites.

the Fisher King.notes: Convalescence at Corbenic — old wound flares.

Black Knight.notes: Bridge maintenance — ford toll booth repairs.

Vortigern.notes: Tower foundation inspection — the dragons stir below.
